name: scopelock
description: Set an approved task boundary and detect repository changes that cross it.

interface.shortDescription: Catch changes outside an approved task boundary
interface.longDescription: Create a local task boundary in a Git project, compare later repository state with the accepted baseline, and report in-scope, out-of-scope, pre-existing, amended, and uncertain changes honestly.
defaultPrompt: Lock this task to the files I approve.
Show whether this task is still within scope.
Verify this task against its ScopeLock boundary.
